title: Refine docs landing page and copy
summary: Redesigned the docs landing page with a stronger open-source project identity and rewrote documentation copy to explain eve's product-history model more clearly.
userVisibleChange: Visitors see a more distinctive homepage and clearer docs explaining that git tracks code while eve tracks product meaning, verification, artifacts, and Git state.

risks.title: The homepage uses local font stacks, so typography varies slightly by operating system.

decisions.title: Use a ruled editorial layout and snapshot specimen instead of a generic hero-card landing page.
Keep fork-facing commands focused on the product UI and CLI, with docs-site commands reserved for documentation work.

validation.command: Playwright verified homepage desktop and mobile layouts, docs index light mode, docs index dark mode, and zero browser console errors or warnings at http://127.0.0.1:4328.
